creator: dereckson@espace-win.org
text:
I submitted the bad pkg-plist.

Here the correct one (I repackaged all the port files in one shar, so
you can ignore the previous one).

On Wed, Jul 7, 2010 at 11:50 PM,  <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/148445'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=148445
>
>>Category:       ports
>>Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>>Synopsis:       New port: devel/egenix-mx-base eGenix.com mx Base Distribution, a set of Python libs
>>Arrival-Date:   Wed Jul 07 23:50:01 UTC 2010
>



-- 
Sébastien Santoro aka Dereckson
